pros: Earn up to 3% cashback on daily payments, even on transactions as small as ₹10.
High-yield savings account earning daily interest at 100% of the RBI repo rate.
Completely free to use with zero account fees and no minimum balance requirements.
Seamlessly combines UPI convenience with credit card rewards for daily banking.
cons: The maximum 3% cashback rate is category-dependent and may vary per transaction.
Savings interest rates are linked to the RBI repo rate, meaning they will fluctuate with market changes.
detailed_review:
Introduction to Slice: Redefining Daily Banking

Slice has emerged as a powerhouse in the Indian fintech space, transitioning from a simple credit card alternative to a comprehensive daily banking hub. Designed specifically for the digital-first generation, Slice seamlessly integrates high-yield savings, instant UPI payments, and credit card rewards into a single, intuitive application. It is designed to make every single transaction—no matter how small—rewarding.

Why Users Love the Slice Experience

The standout feature of Slice is its incredible reward system. Unlike traditional credit cards that only reward large purchases, Slice offers up to 3% cashback on everyday transactions, including your daily ₹10 chai. Additionally, Slice acts as a powerful savings tool. By offering daily interest calculated at 100% of the RBI repo rate, it ensures your idle money works just as hard as you do. Coupled with zero account fees and no minimum balance pressure, it presents a risk-free, highly lucrative banking alternative.

How to Maximize Your Rewards

To get the most out of Slice, make it your primary app for daily micro-transactions. Use the Slice UPI credit card for routine grocery, dining, and transit expenses to stack up cashback. Simultaneously, park your emergency fund or short-term savings in the Slice account to maximize the daily interest payouts, which track the official RBI repo rate directly.

Unlocking the ₹250 Sign-Up Bonus

New users can kickstart their journey with an instant ₹250 cash bonus. By signing up using a valid referral code and completing your first transaction, the bonus is credited directly to your account. It is a simple, foolproof way to experience the benefits of Slice with a free cash reward right from day one.
steps: Download the official Slice app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
Open the app and begin the registration process by entering your mobile number.
On the registration screen, tap on 'Have a Referral Code?' and enter the referral code to qualify for the bonus.
Complete your quick digital KYC verification using your PAN and Aadhaar details.
Set up your Slice UPI ID and link your bank account or activate your Slice savings account.
Make your very first transaction of any amount to instantly unlock and receive your ₹250 sign-up bonus.

faq.question: How do I qualify for the ₹250 Slice referral bonus?
faq.answer: To qualify, you must download the Slice app, enter a valid referral code during the sign-up process, complete your KYC, and make your first transaction.

faq.question: What is the interest rate on the Slice savings account?
faq.answer: Slice offers daily interest on your savings balance at a rate equivalent to 100% of the current RBI repo rate, allowing your savings to grow dynamically with central bank benchmarks.

faq.question: Are there any annual or hidden fees with Slice?
faq.answer: No, Slice is completely free to use. There are zero joining fees, zero annual fees, and no minimum balance requirements.

faq.question: Can I earn cashback on very small transactions?
faq.answer: Yes! Slice rewards daily spending by offering up to 3% cashback on transactions as small as a ₹10 UPI payment.
